rationale: Neither candidate surfaces the one real GT concern (the VoxCPM2 regression follow-up), so recall is essentially zero for both against this sparse GT. X's technical diagnosis is specific and well-grounded (exact file:line trace of tts_local_seed propagation), and its APPROVE verdict with optional, non-blocking suggestions matches the actual outcome (human LGTM). Y traces the same mechanism but then manufactures a 'major'/FOLLOW-UP-REQUIRED blocker demanding perf benchmarks per an unverified 'repo evidence gate,' while itself admitting it couldn't confirm the model-gating logic — an overreaching, weakly-grounded finding that contradicts the real reviewer's clean approval, hurting precision despite similar actionability in citing lines.
